name: Angelini Grill Bruschetta
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the tomatoes and basil.
2. Mix them in a bowl with parsley and olive oil.
3. Season with salt and pepper, to taste.
4. Cut the rolls in half.
5. Toast them under a hot broiler for a few minutes until nicely golden.
6. Remove from oven and rub the toasted side generously with the cut side of the garlic clove.
7. Top each piece with a portion of the tomato mixture and serve immediately.
